Chinese golfer Lin Xiyu claimed the bronze medal in the women's golf competition at the Paris Olympics on Saturday.

New Zealand's Lydia Ko won the gold medal, and the silver went to Germany's Esther Henseleit.

title: China's Lin Xiyu claims women's golf bronze at Paris Olympics - CGTN
author: CGTN
description: Chinese golfer Lin Xiyu claimed the bronze medal in the women's golf competition at the Paris Olympics on Saturday.New Zealand's Lydia Ko won the gold medal, and the silver went to Germany's Esther Henseleit.
